resource.name: Example of a Nepal Baseline Patient
resource.description: A mockup patient record representing Hari Prasad Shrestha to demonstrate validation against the NepalPatient profile.

resource.name: Nepal Administrative Local Level (Palika) Type
resource.description: An extension to categorize the specific local government tier in Nepal (Metropolitan, Sub-Metropolitan, Municipality, or Rural Municipality).

resource.name: Nepal Baseline Patient Profile
resource.description: The ultimate national baseline profile for Patients in Nepal, aligning core identifiers (Health ID, Citizenship, National ID), family contexts, and localized federal geography.

resource.name: Nepal Caste and Ethnicity Value Set
resource.description: The set of allowed codes for capturing a patient's ethnic background in Nepal baseline registries.

resource.name: Nepal Districts Code System
resource.description: The official 77 administrative districts of Nepal sorted by regional alignment.

resource.name: Nepal Districts Value Set
resource.description: Value set for enforcing validated district entry across medical records in Nepal.

resource.name: Nepal HMIS Caste and Ethnicity Group Code System
resource.description: Official classification of caste and ethnic groups utilized by the Ministry of Health and Population (MoHP) Nepal for health management information systems (HMIS).

resource.name: Nepal Local Level Tier Code System
resource.description: Official code system for types of local governance bodies (Palikas) in Nepal.

resource.name: Nepal Local Level Tier Value Set
resource.description: Value set for selecting allowed structural types for local governance (Palika) in Nepal.

resource.name: Nepal Patient Caste and Ethnicity Extension
resource.description: An extension to capture caste or ethnic classifications according to MoHP Nepal digital health guidelines.

resource.name: Nepal Provinces Code System
resource.description: The 7 federal provinces of Nepal as established by the Constitution.

resource.name: Nepal Provinces Value Set
resource.description: Value set for selecting a valid federal province in Nepal.
